SourceString: Welcome back to Lumina {PlayerName}. The shade is trying to snuff out every lantern again.
Start by checking the field outside the village. Even a small anomaly matters now.
The lantern is lit again. Adventurer, you are steadier than I expected.
The footprints keep returning to the same place. Follow the markers and we may find the cause.
The path is open. The mist left a gap and the trail continues through it.
Even the wind is careful inside the forest. Do not follow the sound from the left for too long.
That is a rift shard. From here on do not walk past black light without looking closer.
The pattern on the stone has awakened. A night the guardian could not speak of still remains.
Memories do not disappear. They wait until someone recognizes the heart left behind.
The guardian light is flowing left. The Mist Lord's nest is close.
The shade has gathered. When broken light blocks the path, the Mist Lord appears at its end.
If the road is closed then I will open it first.
Lumina's shade has fallen back. But the rift did not begin with the guardian.
Today's steps are the beginning of the next light. I will meet you under the next shade, adventurer.
This memory does not feel like a road walked for the first time. The Moonshadow Realm is calling you again.
I will hold the front. If the path is blocked I only need to open it first.
I can see the flow of the rift. Read the rule and magic can make a road.
The wind moved first. Follow the trace and you can arrive before the answer does.
This is a road moonlight cannot reach. If your shadow walks ahead of you, do not follow it.
The reflecting lantern is lit again. This road was not a sealed door but an invitation someone left behind.
The corridor has turned above and below around. The record collapsed, but its order remains.
Final entry record confirmed. The Silver Lantern Society watched the rift for a long time instead of closing it.
Here, sight arrives before sound. Break the observation lens and even silence should make a path.
The observatory's silence has lifted. Even within the Apostles of Moonshadow, not everyone believes the same answer.
I remember these stairs. I have never seen this place, but my feet know it first.
The rebirth memory and the real place overlap. Adventurer, you were not only outside this incident.
A returned memory seeks the door again. The door does not answer. The door endures.
If the door endures, then this time I will push through to the end.
The first seal is open. The abyssal dark has not vanished; it has only stepped back.
The flow of Dark is dense here. Even if moonlight purification slows, stay calm and read the rift's grain.
The rift crystal is stable. Even the Abyss has rules. If rules exist, they can be severed.
Every nameplate in this room is blank. Even erased names cannot erase the choices left behind.
My source name remains unconfirmed. But the record purpose is intact. I will guide you to the next door.
There is a black guardian stone. It has the same structure as Lumina's stone, but the light flows the other way.
The sanctuary's light did not go out. Even in darkness, rules remain that can be held.
The gate is moving like a heart. If you hear a name, do not answer it. Look forward only.
The memory shard recognized you. Now the shadow throne waits beyond the door.
You have walked far. If you wish to recover even the words you forgot, come this way. Again, this way.
I will choose which memories I reclaim. Opening a door does not mean I will follow you.
Only the lord's shadow has fallen. The true body still holds the door deep within the Abyss.
Even so, today's door is closed. In the next rebirth, this memory will take you farther.
